title: Can you have an item created on one board that will trigger a deletion on another?
excerpt: Looking to have a item that is created on one board trigger a deletion of the same named item on another board. Is this possible? I have several different trackers that I need items removed from once it is added to anoth…

posts.author: abeatrice (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking to have a item that is created on one board trigger a deletion of the same named item on another board. Is this possible? I have several different trackers that I need items removed from once it is added to another board. I use it for off-boarding employees. Is this possible? I don’t see a current solution with an automation

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @abeatrice, if the boards are connected (via connect board columns) you could use this approach I posted a little while back:

Tip Tuesday - How to Delete a Connected Item in a Master Board Setup - Platform discussions / Special workflows & use cases - monday Community Forum

Hope this helps!
Mark
